target_features: Phase 6 UX Polish: Implement Windows-familiar defaults, shortcuts, and theme refinements.
constraints: The strategic pause has been lifted as systemd validation debt is cleared. Focus entirely on Phase 6 UX Polish.
Implement Windows-familiar keyboard shortcuts, adjust default UI layouts, and refine theming elements within the allowed directories.
Do not modify core system services, boot logic, or package management infrastructure.
Ensure all UI modifications maintain the overall performance and stability of the KDE Plasma desktop.
